channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated South African news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: U.S. Plans to End AIDS Funding for South Africa

item.title: SAHRC Takes Ngizwe Mchunu to Johannesburg High Court Over LGBTQ+ Hate Speech
item.description: JOHANNESBURG, GAUTENG — The South African Human Rights Commission (SAHRC) is taking media personality Ngizwe Mchunu to the Johannesburg High Court over allegations of LGBTQ+ hate speech and incitement. The legal action stems from a series of controversial remarks made by Mchunu regarding same-sex couples, sparking a national debate on the balance between freedom of [...] (via South Africa Today) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: South Africa Today

item.title: Hugo Broos ties Shakes Mashaba as ‘most-capped’ Bafana Bafana coach

item.title: R100k fine for employing illegal immigrants: What the law actually says
item.description: The R100 000 figure making headlines is not yet law. Here is how to tell the two apart. Two laws, one conversation If you have seen the R100 000 fine warning circulating online, you are not alone. The figure has been widely reported in recent weeks and while it is rooted in a rea #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Cape Town Etc
